info.name: qflow-api
info.description: Postman Collection for QFlow API. Run '00 Manual OTP Required' first to request and verify OTP for admin/provider/user, then run flows 04-10 for categories, providers, queues, notifications, and cleanup.

item.name: 00 Manual OTP Required
item.description: Run these OTP requests manually on production-like environments. Fill *_otp_code variables from real OTP before Verify OTP requests.

request.description: Request OTP for Admin. In production, read OTP from SMS/provider and set {{admin_otp_code}} manually before Verify OTP.
Verify OTP for Admin and save JWT to {{admin_token}}.

exec: console.warn('[SKIP] Missing admin_otp_code. Run Request OTP and fill this variable before Verify OTP.');

request.description: Request OTP for Provider. In production, read OTP from SMS/provider and set {{provider_otp_code}} manually before Verify OTP.
Verify OTP for Provider and save JWT to {{provider_token}}.

exec: console.warn('[SKIP] Missing provider_otp_code. Run Request OTP and fill this variable before Verify OTP.');

request.description: Request OTP for User. In production, read OTP from SMS/provider and set {{user_otp_code}} manually before Verify OTP.
Verify OTP for User and save JWT to {{user_token}}.

exec: console.warn('[SKIP] Missing user_otp_code. Run Request OTP and fill this variable before Verify OTP.');

request.description: Get authenticated user profile.
Update authenticated user profile.
Create category used later by provider. Requires admin token.

exec: console.warn('[SKIP] Missing collection variable: admin_token. Fill it before running this flow.');

request.description: Get all categories. Public endpoint.
Get category by id. Public endpoint.
Update provider-flow category. Requires admin token.

exec: console.warn('[SKIP] Missing collection variable: admin_token. Fill it before running this flow.');

request.description: Create an isolated category for delete testing. It is not linked to any provider.

request.description: Get all providers. Public endpoint.

Create queue for call/complete test.
